summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tester Workspace (Quality Engine) implementation. All core features working correctly including demo login, dashboard, navigation, and all tester pages.
passed_tests: Demo tester login from /builder/auth page - Tester button works correctly
Tester Dashboard (TesterHub) loads with correct stats: Pending (0), In Progress (0), Passed (0), Failed (0)
Tester Validation List page with tabs: Pending, In Progress, Failed, Passed - all tabs present and functional
Tester Issues page shows issue statistics: High (0), Medium (0), Low (0) with proper layout
Tester Performance page displays metrics: Validations (0), Pass Rate (100%), Issues Found (0), Critical Issues (0)
Sidebar navigation between Dashboard, Validation, Issues, Performance works seamlessly
QA OS logo displayed correctly in sidebar
User info (Demo Tester) shown properly in sidebar with logout functionality
TesterLayout with nested routes using Outlet working correctly
All pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Responsive design and dark theme implementation working well
